name_cn:
2022C Pre-Fall Collection Black Silver Buckle
New Arrival〰️Classic 19 Black Sand Silver Buckle
Low-key with a full sense of high-end retro
Black returns, the new hardware color is especially beautiful and hits my heart♥
Becoming the classic trendsetter of the season〰️
Three carrying ways: Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld
Chain mix: Sand Silver, Vintage Gold, Light Gold
Small Size:16*26*9cm
